text: ויעלה בפנים השניים אדם עירום, ואמצעית סוס ואמצעית שור. ואמרו חכמי הודו בי יעלה שם אשה יצאה מביתה, והיא ערומה ואין לה שום דבר, והיא נבנסת בים. ויעלה על דעת בטלמיוס סוף יד הדוב הקטן, וקצה זנב התנין, והנזר השמאלי, ופחדי המאזנים ורגליו, ונזר עקרב.
translation: In the second decan, a naked man rises, and the middle of a horse and the middle of an ox. The Indian scientists said that a woman leaving her house rises there, naked and possessing nothing, entering the sea. According to Ptolemy, the end of the Little Bear's hand rises, and the tip of the Dragon's tail, and the left crown, and the thighs and feet of Libra, and the crown of Scorpio.

text: ויעלה בפנים השלישיים ראשית הסוס, ונושא הארנבת, וראשית שור. ויאמרו חכמי הודו בי יעלה שם כלב, ושני חזירים, ונמר גדול ושערו לבן, ומיני ציד. ויעלה בו על דעת בטלמיוס צורת הדוב הקטן, ורגל ההולך על ארכובותיו, ושבמו וזרועו הימנים, ובטן עקרב, וראש המחתה.
translation: In the third decan, the beginning of a horse rises, and the bearer of the hare, and the beginning of an ox. The Indian scientists said that a dog rises there, and two pigs, and a large leopard with white hair, and various kinds of hunting. According to Ptolemy, the form of the Little Bear rises, and the leg of one walking on his knees, and his right shoulder and arm, and the belly of Scorpio, and the head of the censer.

translation: Its waist is of the nature of Venus, and the stars in its thighs are of the nature of Venus and somewhat of Mercury. (8) And those in the head of Virgo, at the end of its right wing, are of the nature of Mercury and somewhat of Mars; and those in the hips are of the nature of Venus; and those in the left wing are a mixture of Saturn and Mercury; and the star called Simak al-A'zal is of the nature of Venus and somewhat of Mercury; and the stars in its legs are of the nature of Mercury and somewhat of Mars. (9) And the two stars on the pan of Libra are a mixture of Jupiter and Mercury. (10) And the star in the claws of Scorpio is of the nature of Saturn and somewhat of Mercury and Mars; and the bright stars on the back of Scorpio are of the nature of Mars and somewhat of Saturn, and its heart is of the nature of Mars and somewhat of Jupiter, and that in its tail is of the nature of Saturn and somewhat of Venus; and the nebulous stars there are a mixture of Mars and the Moon. (11) And the nebulous stars in Sagittarius are a mixture of Mercury and the Moon; and those in the back of Sagittarius are of the nature of Jupiter and somewhat of Mercury; and the legs of the horse are a mixture of Jupiter and Saturn, and the stars of its tail are of the nature of Venus and somewhat of Saturn. (12) And those in the mouth of Capricorn are of the nature of Mars and somewhat of Venus, and those in its belly are a mixture of Mars and Mercury, and in its tail are a mixture of Saturn and Mercury. (13) And those in the shoulder of Aquarius and its left hand are a mixture of Saturn and Mercury, and in its nostrils are of the nature of Mercury and somewhat of Saturn, and those in the stream are of the nature of Saturn and somewhat of Jupiter. (14) And in the head of Pisces are of the nature of Mercury and somewhat of Saturn, and in its belly are a mixture of Jupiter and Mercury, and in its tail are of the nature of Saturn and somewhat of Mercury, and those in its belly on the northern side are of the nature of Jupiter and somewhat of Venus; and those at the end of Pisces are of the nature of Mars and somewhat of Mercury.

translation: (1) These are the stars that are in the northern part of the ecliptic. (2) The bright ones in Ursa Minor are a mixture of Saturn and somewhat of Venus. (3) And those in Ursa Major, which are 'Ayish and her sons, are a mixture of the Moon and Venus. (4) And the bright ones that are with Draco are a mixture of Saturn and Mars. (5) And the Blazing One is a mixture of Jupiter and Saturn. (6) And those in the bed of the Armed Warrior are a mixture of Saturn and Mercury. (7) And the bright one in the Northern Crown is a mixture of Venus and Mercury. (8) And the one crawling on his knees is of the nature of Mercury. (9) And the bright one which is the Falling Eagle is a mixture of Venus and Mercury. (10) And similarly, the bright one called the Hen. (11) And those in the Woman Sitting on the Throne are a mixture of Venus and Saturn. (12) And those of the Horseman Carrying the Devil's Head are a mixture of Saturn and Jupiter, and those on his sword are a mixture of Mars and Mercury. (13) And the bright one called Al-Ayyuq is a mixture of Mars and Mercury. (14) And those in the Carrier of the Serpent are of the nature of Saturn and somewhat of Venus, and those on his back are a mixture of Saturn and Mars. (15) And the Flying Eagle is a mixture of Jupiter and Mars. (16) And the stars of the fish called Dolphin are a mixture of Saturn and Mars. (17) And the bright ones in the Bow are a mixture of Mars and Mercury. (18) And the stars that are in the Woman Who Has Not Seen a Husband are of the nature of Venus. (19) And those in the Triangle are of the nature of Mercury.

(12) And those in the Southern Crown are of the nature of Mercury. (13) And the stars of the Painter are a mixture of Saturn and Mercury. These are the stars that the ancients observed. §3 (1) The Third Chapter: On the aspects of the degrees of the zodiac, their love and hatred, and the matters of the quadrants of the zodiac and its twelve parts, and what they indicate at every moment. (2) The aspect is in four ways: the sextile aspect, the quartile aspect, the trine aspect, and the opposition aspect. (3) And the signs of aspect are seven: the third, the fourth, the fifth, the seventh, the ninth, the tenth, and the eleventh. (4) And the aspect to the third and to the eleventh is a sextile aspect, and the aspect to the fourth and to the tenth is a quartile aspect, and the aspect to the fifth and to the ninth is a trine aspect, and the aspect to the seventh is an opposition aspect. And the aspect to the third, fourth, and fifth is left, and the aspect to the ninth, tenth, and eleventh is right. (5) The sextile aspect is a sixth of the zodiac, which is sixty degrees; and the quartile aspect is a fourth of the zodiac, which is ninety degrees; and the trine aspect is a third of the zodiac, which is one hundred and twenty degrees; and the opposition aspect is half the zodiac, which is one hundred and eighty degrees. (6) And an example of this is if the rising sign is the beginning of Aries; then its left sextile aspect will be at the beginning of Gemini, and its right sextile aspect at the beginning of Aquarius; its left quartile aspect at the beginning of Cancer, and its right quartile aspect at the beginning of Capricorn; its left trine aspect at the beginning of Leo, and its right trine aspect at the beginning of Sagittarius; and the opposition aspect at the beginning of Libra. (7) And the strongest of the aspects is the opposition aspect, and after it in strength is the quartile aspect, and after the quartile aspect in strength is the trine aspect, and the weakest of all is the sextile aspect. (8) And the opposition aspect is complete enmity, and the quartile aspect is half enmity, and the trine aspect is complete love, and the sextile aspect is half love. (5) והמזלות שהם בחשב האפודה נבונים, בל Sow מזלות שהם בתים לכוכב Stns כמו טלה ועקרב למאדים, ושור ומאזנים לנגה, ותאומים ובתולה לכוכב חמה, וקשת ודגים לצדק, וגדי ודלי לשבתאי; א"ע"פ שיש ללבנה בית Ins ולשמש בית אחד, בעבור כי שניהם מושלים, יהיו נחשבים בתיהם באילו הם למושל אחד. translation: Some signs are antagonistic in aspect but loving in another way, because they are on the same calculation path in their ascensions, or in power, or in the ecliptic. And those whose ascensions are equal are: Aries and Pisces, Virgo and Libra, Taurus and Aquarius, Leo and Scorpio, Gemini and Capricorn, and Cancer and Sagittarius. And those that are of one power, every sign whose distorted hours are equal, like Cancer with Gemini, and Taurus with Leo, and Aries with Virgo, and Pisces with Libra, and Aquarius with Scorpio, and Capricorn with Sagittarius. And the planet that is in one of the straight signs is called the ruler, and that which is opposite its degree in one of the crooked signs is the servant. And the signs that are in the ecliptic calculation are understood, every pair of signs that are houses for one planet, like Aries and Scorpio for Mars, and Taurus and Libra for Venus, and Gemini and Virgo for Mercury, and Sagittarius and Pisces for Jupiter, and Capricorn and Aquarius for Saturn; even though the Moon has one house and the Sun has one house, because both are rulers, their houses are considered to be for one ruler. And Aries and Libra, and Capricorn and Cancer, and Virgo and Pisces, and the others, even though they are of the same active nature, there is enmity between them because of the opposition aspect.

translation: And the circle is divided at every moment of the hours into four parts. For the quadrant of the circle that is from the midheaven line to the ascendant degree is eastern and masculine, advancing; and what resembles it in the four roots is air; and in the human body, blood; and in the seasons of the year, the time of heat; and from the divisions of the quarters of day and night, the first part; and from the years of man, the time of childhood; and from the appearance of the eyes, whiteness. And the quadrant that is from the midheaven line to the descendant degree is southern, and weak like a female, and its actions are retreating; and what resembles it in the four roots is fire; and from the seasons of the year, summer; and from the quarters of day and night, the second part; and in the human body, red bile; and from the time of his years, youth; and the color of its appearance, red. And the quadrant that is from the descendant degree to the degree of the Imum Coeli is western, with masculine power, and it advances; and what resembles it in the roots is earth; and in the seasons of the year, winter; and from the quarters of day and night, the third quarter; and in the human body, black bile; and from his years, when he is close to fifty; and the color of its appearance, black. And the quadrant that is from the Imum Coeli line to the ascendant degree is northern, like a female, retreating; and what resembles it in the roots is water; and in the seasons of the year, cold; and from the quarters of day and night, the last quarter; and in the human body, cold mixed with phlegm; and from his years, the days of old age and gray hair; and the color of its appearance, green.

(5) והיתדות חזקים מהסמוכים?, והסמוכים חזקים מן החלשים. (6) והתקיף | שביתדות הראשון והעשירי, והתקיף בסמוכים החמישי והעשתי עשר, והתקיף בחלשים השישי והתשיעי (7) וכל רגע יהיו בתי? הגלגל דומים לארבעת השרשים?ן; והנה נתן דמיון ביתדות!!, כי בהיות Stan הצומח טלה, שהוא בתולדת האש, יהיה בקו חצי השמים גדי, שהוא בתולדת הארץ?, Sram השוקע מאזנים, שהוא כתולדת ANA וקו DIANA סרטן, שהוא כתולדת המים; וככה דרך הבתים הסמוכים והחלשים!. (8) ואלה השנים עשר בתים on עיקרים במולד האדם, ובשאלות ובמבחרים, גס במשפטי העולם שהם הבלל.
translation: And at every moment the circle is divided into twelve parts, according to the number of the signs, and they are called houses. And four of them are called by one name, and these are the first, fourth, seventh, and tenth houses; all four are called angles because they are like points. And the second, fifth, eighth, and eleventh, all four are called by one name, as they are succedent to the angles. And the third, sixth, ninth, and twelfth houses, all four are called by one name, as they are weak. And the angles are stronger than the succedent houses, and the succedent houses are stronger than the weak ones. And the strongest among the angles are the first and tenth, and the strongest among the succedent houses are the fifth and eleventh, and the strongest among the weak ones are the sixth and ninth. And at every moment the houses of the circle will be similar to the four roots; and behold, a similarity is given in the angles, for when the ascendant is Aries, which is of the nature of fire, the midheaven will be Capricorn, which is of the nature of earth, and the descendant Libra, which is of the nature of air, and the Imum Coeli Cancer, which is of the nature of water; and so is the way of the succedent and weak houses. And these twelve houses are fundamental in a person's birth, and in questions and elections, and also in the judgments of the world, which are the general ones.

translation: The first house is the ascendant from the beginning of the eastern line, and it signifies life and bodies, and speech and knowledge, and fertility and the beginning of all actions, and what is rooted in human thought, and from the years of man it signifies his beginning. And the lord of the first triplicity signifies life, and the nature of the native and the querent, and his desires, and all that will happen to him, good or bad, in the beginning of his life. And the lord of the second triplicity signifies the body, and strength, and the middle years of a person. And the lord of the third triplicity, who is the partner, is associated with its companions regarding all their indications and indicates the end of the human years.

title: The Second House and Its Triplicities
text: הבית השני יורה על הממון ועל הקנין, ועל המשא ומתן, ועל המאכל, ועל העוזרים ועל המשתחוים, ועל העדים, ועל המפתחות, ועל המטמונות. (2) ובעל השלישות הראשונה יורה על הממון בתחלת ימי האדם. ובעל השלישות השנית יורה על אמצעית ימיו, ובעל השלישות השלישית על סוף ימיו.
translation: The second house signifies money and property, and trade, and food, and helpers and those who bow down, and witnesses, and keys, and treasures. And the lord of the first triplicity signifies money in the beginning of a person's life. And the lord of the second triplicity signifies the middle of his life, and the lord of the third triplicity signifies the end of his life.

text: הבית השלישי יורה על האחים ועל האחיות, ועל הקרובים, ועל החותנים, ועל החכמה, ועל הענוה, ועל העצה, ועל האמונה, ועל האגרות, ועל השמועות, ועל ההליכה. (2) ובעל השלישות הראשונה יורה על האחים הגדולים, ובעל השלישות השנית על האחים האמצעיים, ובעל השלישות השלישית על האחים הקטנים.
translation: The third house signifies brothers and sisters, and relatives, and in-laws, and wisdom, and humility, and counsel, and faith, and letters, and rumors, and journeys. And the lord of the first triplicity signifies the older brothers, and the lord of the second triplicity signifies the middle brothers, and the lord of the third triplicity signifies the younger brothers.

But if it is in a low degree, its benefit will be small. And if a malefic planet is in conjunction with it, and both are strong, then it signifies great victory and violence, as above. But if the malefic planet is not strong, then it will give him every despicable and lowly thing, such as dishonor and shame, and all this I will explain in the book of nativities.

author: Abraham Ibn Ezra

title: Saturn's Influence on Physical Appearance
text: ואם היה שבתאי מתבודד על צורת האדם, אז תהיה קומתו זקופה, ויהיה מראהו אמצעי בין לבן ושחור, והוא עניו, ומתיקר, וחזק, ושערו שחור תלתלים, ובחזהו שער, Pry‏ אמצעיות, וירבה Mona‏ הקור והלחה. (26) וכל זה אם היה שבתאי מזרחי מפאת השמש, באשר אפרש, ואם היה מערבי יהיה רזה5!, ואין שערו תלתלים, ותולדתו קרה ויבשה. (27) והכלל כי הוא יורה על מכוער. בתואר ומראה, oy‏ שער רב בגופו, ונחיריו עבים, ובבה שפתיו! ושיניו, וריחו נבאש.
translation: And if Saturn is solitary in the form of a person, then his stature will be upright, and his appearance will be intermediate between white and black, and he will be humble, and respected, and strong, and his hair will be black and curly, and he will have hair on his chest, and his eyes will be medium-sized, and he will have much cold and phlegm. And all this is if Saturn is oriental with respect to the Sun, as I will explain. But if it is occidental, he will be thin, and his hair will not be curly, and his nature will be cold and dry. And in general, it signifies one who is ugly in form and appearance, with much hair on his body, and thick nostrils, and thick lips and teeth, and his smell is foul.

title: Jupiter's Influence on Nativity
text: ואם היה מתבודד על מולד אדם, יתן לו מתולדתו כל דבר נכבד, ואם הדבר אם לא היה בכחו. (22) ויוסיפו ויגרעו המשרתים בהתערבם עמו, בין במחברת בין במבט: ואם הכוכבים יהיו רעים, יגרעו מטובתו, ואם טובים, יוסיפו על טובתו.
translation: (21) If it [Jupiter] rules alone over a person's nativity, it will give him everything honorable, and the opposite applies if it is not in its strength. (22) The planets increase and diminish (these indications) when they are associated with it, whether by conjunction or aspect: if the planets are malefic, they will diminish its good fortune; if benefic, they will increase its good fortune.

title: Jupiter's Physical Manifestations
text: (23) ויורה מצורת אדם, אם היה מזרחי, על קומה נאה, ומראה הגוף לבן עם אודם, ושערו מעט, ועיניו יפות, והוא איש יקר בכל מעשיו, ותולדתו חמה ולחה. (24) ואם היה מערבי יהיה גופו ישר רק לא יהיה הלובן שלו נקי, ושער ראשו הפך תלתלים, והוא קרח, ותרבה בו הלחה. (25) והכלל שהוא יורה על אדם שיש לו נפש טובה, ויצר טוב, ועין יפה, וזקן נאה, ושערו דק.
translation: (23) Regarding a person's form, if it [Jupiter] is oriental, it signifies a fine stature, a body appearance white with some redness, sparse hair, beautiful eyes, and he is a respected person in all his actions, and his nature is hot and moist. (24) But if it is occidental, his body will be straight, but his whiteness will not be pure, and his head hair will be the opposite of curly, and he will be bald, and moisture will abound in him. (25) In general, it indicates a person with a good soul, good inclination, beautiful eyes, a handsome beard, and thin hair.

text: (26) ובחלקו מגוף האדם, הכבד, והאזן השמאלית, והצלעות, גם כל הדם. (27) ותחלואיו כל חולי שיסור מהרה. (28) ומשנות אדם, הזמן שהוא בין הבחרות והזקנה. (29) וממראה העינים, הלבן, והירוק, והמכורכם, והישר, וכל צבע יפה ובורק. (30) ומן הפאות, השמאלית. (31) ומהימים, יום חמישי, ומהלילות, ליל שני, ונמשעותיהם הראשונה והשמינית. (32) ומהאותיות, חית וסמך ובית, וזאת הצורה =. (33) ושנותיו העצומות ארבע מאות ושבע ועשרים, והגדולות תשע ושבעים, והאמצעיות חמש וארבעים וחצי, והקטנות שתים עשרה. (34) ושנות החלק אל פרדאר שתים עשרה. (35) ובוח גופו תשע מעלות, לפניו גם אחריו.
translation: (26) In its portion of the human body are the liver, the left ear, the ribs, and all blood. (27) Of its infirmities, every disease that passes quickly. (28) Of the ages of man, the time between youth and old age. (29) Of eye colors, white, green, saffron, straight, and any beautiful and shining color. (30) Of the directions, the left (north). (31) Of the days, Thursday, and of the nights, Monday night, and of their hours, the first and eighth. (32) Of the letters, Chet, Samekh, and Bet, and this shape =. (33) Its greatest years are 427, the great 79, the middle 45 and a half, and the least 12. (34) The years of the al-fardar portion are 12. (35) The strength of its body is nine degrees, before it and after it.

(10) Of the animals, hyenas, dogs, and the leopard. (11) Of the birds, al-buzi'ah, which is astor. (12) Of the creeping things of the earth, all that are harmful, like the adder, and the scorpion, and every creature with deadly poison.

title: Mars' Influence on Nativity and Appearance
text: (19) ואם היה מתבודד על מולד אדם, יתן לו מתולדתו הטוב שיש לו אם היה בכחו ויסתכלו אליו כוכבים טובים; והפך הדבר אם לא היה בכחו ויתערבו עמו כוכבים רעים. (20) ואם היה מזרחי מהשמש, יהיה הנולד ארוך, ומראהו לבן נוטה אל אדמדמות, ויש לו שער רב על גופו. ואם היה מערבי, יהיה קצר קומה, ומראהו אדום, ופניו עגולות, ועיניו קטנות, ושערו אדום איננו תלתלים, ותולדת גופו יבשה.
translation: (19) If it [Mars] rules alone over a person's nativity, it will give him the good it possesses if it is in its strength and benefic planets aspect it; and the opposite applies if it is not in its strength and malefic planets are associated with it. (20) If it is oriental to the Sun, the native will be tall, and his appearance white tending to reddishness, and he will have much hair on his body. And if it is occidental, he will be short in stature, and his appearance red, and his face round, and his eyes small, and his red hair not curly, and the nature of his body dry.

title: Mercury's Influence on Appearance
text: If it [Mercury] rules alone over a person’s form, and it is oriental (of the Sun), he [the native] will be short, his head will be small, and his eyes beautiful; but if it is occidental (of the Sun), his complexion will be of intermediate color, (that is,) between dark and pale, and he will be thin, his eyes small, and dryness will predominate in him. (17) In general: it signifies a person with a protruding forehead, long nose, emaciated, with a scraggly beard, long fingers, a moral and learned person.

text: Or when it ascends in the circle of apogee and perigee whose center is far from [i.e., not the same as] the center of the Earth? author: Abraham Ibn Ezra

title: Planetary Weakness: Conditions for Debility
text: A planet is weak when its motion is slowing down. (2) Or when it is in the first station.! (3) Or when it is retrograde; being retrograde is more inauspicious for the two lower planets, particularly if they are burnt? by the Sun. (4) Or when the planet is under the ray of the Sun.° (5) Or when it is in the dark degrees. (6) Or when it is in the opposite (condition) to its similitude.* (7) Or (when it is) in the house of its dejection. (8) Or when it descends in the south® or (when it is) southern. (9) Or (when it is) in one of the cadent places. (10) Or (when it is) in the path of burning, which is from Libra 19° to Scorpio 3°.” (11) Or (when it is) in the house of its detriment.® (12) Or when it applies to a retrograde planet or to one that is in the house of its dejection or in a cadent place. (13) Or when the planet is not received® {by another planet). (14) Or when it is a stranger in its position, and this is more inauspicious if it is not aspected by a planet. (15) Or when the three upper planets are occidental of the Sun, or in one of the feminine quadrants, or in the feminine signs. (16) The same holds true for the Sun, unless it is in the ninth place, because that is the place of its joy. (17) The lower planets are weak when they begin to be oriental of the Sun, or when they are in one of the masculine quadrants.”
translation: A planet is weak when its motion is slowing down. (2) Or when it is in the first station. (3) Or when it is retrograde; being retrograde is more inauspicious for the two lower planets, particularly if they are burnt by the Sun. (4) Or when the planet is under the ray of the Sun. (5) Or when it is in the dark degrees. (6) Or when it is in the opposite (condition) to its similitude. (7) Or (when it is) in the house of its dejection. (8) Or when it descends in the south or (when it is) southern. (9) Or (when it is) in one of the cadent places. (10) Or (when it is) in the path of burning, which is from Libra 19° to Scorpio 3°. (11) Or (when it is) in the house of its detriment. (12) Or when it applies to a retrograde planet or to one that is in the house of its dejection or in a cadent place. (13) Or when the planet is not received {by another planet). (14) Or when it is a stranger in its position, and this is more inauspicious if it is not aspected by a planet. (15) Or when the three upper planets are occidental of the Sun, or in one of the feminine quadrants, or in the feminine signs. (16) The same holds true for the Sun, unless it is in the ninth place, because that is the place of its joy. (17) The lower planets are weak when they begin to be oriental of the Sun, or when they are in one of the masculine quadrants.

(8) והקושי הרב על הלבנה בהיותה ככה, והקושי על השמש בהיות המרחק? ארבע מעלות לפניה או לאחריה. 6 (1)ואמרו הקדמונים בי תולדת ראש התלי להוסיף ותולדת הזנב לחסר? והנה, אם היו?! הכוכבים הטובים op‏ הראש!! יוסיף xin‏ על טובתם, ואם רעים יוסיף על רעתם; oI‏ היו הטובים עם הזנב יחסר מטובתם, ואם היו עמו חמזיקים יחסר מרעתם. (2) על 73 אמר חכם TIT‏ כי הראש טוב OY‏ חטובים ורע oy‏ הרעים, והזנב רע OY‏ הטובים וטוב py‏ הרעים. 7 )1( ומדלות הכוכב שיהיה הכוכב ממוצע בין שנים מזיקים, במחברת או במבט, באשר אפרש עוד.
translation: from the bounds of a planet. (3) Or that it is in the bounds of a malefic, or in its house. (4) Or that one of the malefics is elevated above it, being in the tenth or eleventh house opposite the place of the planet. (5) And it is worse if the malefic is not receiving, and if the malefics are in conjunction with the Sun, or in a square aspect, or opposite; (6) Or if the planet is with its own North Node or South Node; (7) Or with the Moon's North Node or South Node, and there is less than twelve degrees between them. (8) And the great difficulty is for the Moon when it is like this, and the difficulty for the Sun when the distance is four degrees before or after it. 6 (1) And the ancients said that the nature of the North Node is to add, and the nature of the South Node is to subtract. Behold, if the benefic planets were with the North Node, it would add to their beneficence, and if malefic, it would add to their malice; if the benefics were with the South Node, their beneficence would diminish, and if the malefics were with it, their malice would diminish. (2) Regarding this, a wise man said that the North Node is good for benefics and bad for malefics, and the South Node is bad for benefics and good for malefics. 7 (1) And a planet's debility is when the planet is midway between two malefics, in conjunction or aspect, as I will explain further.

translation: From the Sun, after the opposition of 135 degrees, three-quarters of its body remains illuminated. From there, until its distance from the opposition is 90 degrees, half of its body is illuminated. From there, until it is 45 degrees from the Sun, one-quarter of its light remains. From there, until it is 12 degrees away, it enters under the rays. From 6 degrees, it is under combustion. Know that when you subtract these degrees, sometimes it is under the ray and sometimes under combustion. Then 12 conditions remain, and these are called the lunar keys. They are very important for knowing about rain. Chapter Seven. On the conditions of the planets, which are thirty: approach, conjunction, mixture, aspect, separation, solitary motion, desolation, translation, clustering, reflecting the light, giving power, giving lordship, giving nature, giving two natures, advance, distortion, prohibition, returning with amelioration, returning with corruption, cancellation, accident, loss, cutting the light, pleasantness, recompense, reception, generosity, similitude, intermediacy, and domination. "Approach" is when two planets are in the same sign, direct in their motions, and the degrees of the swifter planet in the sign are less than the degrees of the slower planet. As long as its degrees are less, it is said to be "approaching"; when it is with it in the same minute, its approach is completed. Approach begins when the distance between them is less than 15 degrees, and the fewer degrees between them, the stronger they are in everything they signify. The same holds true for approach in the rays of light, which are the seven aspects mentioned previously. "Conjunction": When two planets are in the same sign, each of them within the power of the other's body, they are said to be in conjunction. When they are in the same minute, their power is complete in everything they signify. If one of them is within the power of the other's body, but the latter is not within the power of the former's body, all their indications will not be full unless each of them is close by, only an approach to its half. And a similar case is when the distance between the Moon and Saturn is eight degrees, forward or backward, and behold, each of them is in the power of the other's body; and if there are ten degrees between them, Saturn will be in the power of the Moon's body, but the Moon is not in the power of Saturn's body. And whenever the swift planet moves towards the conjunction of the heavy one, it has more power from the moment it separates from it, even if it is in the power of its body. And if the two planets were in two signs, and each of them in the power of the other's body, they would not be said to be in conjunction because they are in different signs. This is the opinion of the ancients, and I, Abraham, the translator of the book, disagree with them, as I will explain in the book of Nativities. Also, the ancients did not mention for the superior planets that are in the zodiacal circle the measure of the power of their bodies, only Doronius alone said that it is a quarter of a sign. And the opinion of the diligent in this wisdom is that the measure of the body of the servant, whether the superior planet is from the first or second dignity. And the meaning of conjunction: the conjunction of two or more planets, each one's sphere lower than its companion's sphere, and both will be opposite one degree and one minute opposite the zodiacal circle. Then the swift one will hide the heavy one from the sight of the eye, for it is under it. And this will be if there is no space between them, calculated by the ephemeris, and I will speak further on this. "Mixture." When a planet conjoins another planet, and they are among the servants, then another nature will be born from both of their natures. Like Saturn and Mars, each of which is a malefic, and when they conjoin, the ancients said it indicates good. And the truth is that one will nullify the action of its companion, and the native will be saved from harm, and behold, they will not indicate good, but only the good that they are not harmful. And Jupiter with Saturn is the great conjunction because both are superior, and in the power of whichever of them it is, its nature will be seen. And Mars with Venus, their conjunction is mixed, as I will explain. And the conjunction of the servants with the Sun harms them, and the hardest of all is on Venus, the Moon, Saturn, and Mars, also they harm the Sun when they conjoin with it. And Jupiter and Venus will do good and not evil. And Mercury, because of its many movements and its proximity to the Sun, will always be slightly. To always be carried to the degrees that are equal in their movements. And the example is that one planet is at ten degrees of Aries and the second at twenty degrees of Pisces, and behold, the distance of both from the line of the equator is equal, and behold, they are considered as if they are in conjunction. And another way, as if they are in one degree whose distorted hours are equal, as in sixteen degrees of Aries with fourteen of Taurus; and the reason for this is because their distance from the head of Cancer is equal, and similarly if their distance from the head of Capricorn was equal. And that their distance from the head of Aries or from Libra. And Mars is harmful, and if the conjunction is with Saturn. Or in one of the aspects, less than six degrees from it, it is also in its mixture. Another. Degrees. It happens. The planet. Is transferred. And that heavy one with a heavier one than it. To. The one. Will return. The light. Lord. "Giving power" is when a planet is in its house, or in the house of its exaltation, or in the house of its triplicity, or in its term, or in its decan, and conjoins or aspects another planet—in which case it gives its own power to it. "Giving lordship" is when one planet aspects another planet, in an aspect of total love or of half love—in which case the mixture of both is tempered. "Giving nature" is when a planet applies to the lord of the sign in which it is, or the lord of the house of its exaltation, or the lord of its term, or the lord of its triplicity, or the lord of its decan—in which case it gives its nature to the other planet. "Giving two natures" has two types. The first is when a planet is in a sign in which it has a dignity and conjoins or aspects another planet that has a dignity in this sign, such as when Venus is with Jupiter in Pisces. The second type is when a planet applies to another planet of the same nature, such as diurnal planets with diurnal planets and nocturnal planets with nocturnal planets. "Advance" means that a planet is in its highest rank, and this is when it is in one of the cardines or a succedent place. "Distortion" is when a planet is in one of the cadent places. "Prohibition" has two types. The first is when three planets are in the same sign, but in different degrees, and the heavy one has the most degrees; then the middle one prevents the light one, which has the fewest degrees, from application to the heavy one, until it passes it. For example, if Saturn is at Aries 20 degrees, Mercury is at 15 degrees there, and Venus is at Aries 11 degrees, Mercury prevents Venus from application to Saturn until it passes it; after that Venus applies to it. The second type is by aspect, when two planets are in the same sign and the swift one is applying to the heavy one, and another planet aspects that heavy planet, whatever aspect it may be; and behold, the planet that is with it in the sign prevents the aspecting planet and corrupts it, provided that their degrees are equal. Only if the degrees of the aspecting planet are closer to the aspect, the applying planet cannot prevent the aspecting planet.

title: Returning to Good Fortune
text: וההשבה לטוב. דע בי ההשבה בבה היא שיתחבר כוכב כוכב שהוא תחת אור השמש או יביט אליו; והנה הכובב לא יוכללקבל האור בעבור דלותווהנה ישיבנו. ועוד דרך אחרת שיתחבר כוכב אחורנית, והנה ישיב עלין מה שקבל. ויהיה ההשבה לטובה בשלשה דרכים. האחד יהיה האוחז הכח ששב אליו מקבל את הנותן. והשני שיהיה הכוכב הקל ישר בהליכתו והכבד נשרף או תחת האור או חוזר אחורנית. והשלישי שיהיה הכוכב המשיב באחד הבתים הנופלים ויהיה הבוכב ששב האור אליו באחד היתדות או הסמוכים.
translation: Returning to good fortune. Know that returning is when a planet conjoins or aspects another planet that is under the Sun's light; and behold, the planet cannot receive the light due to its weakness, and thus it returns it. And another way is when a planet conjoins a retrograde planet, and behold, it returns what it received. And returning to good fortune occurs in three ways. The first is when the one holding the power that returns to it receives the giver. The second is when the light planet is direct in its motion and the heavy one is combust, or under the light, or retrograde. The third is when the returning planet is in one of the cadent houses, and the planet to which the light is returned is in one of the cardines or succedent houses.

work: Introductions to Astrology (Beginning of Wisdom & Judgments of the Zodiacal Signs)
title: Returning to Misfortune
text: וההשבה לרע: הפך על שלשה דרכים הנזכרים.
translation: Returning to misfortune: the opposite of the three aforementioned ways.
chunk_ref: d the light one [A] applies to the heavy one [B], and another planet [C] aspects

author: Abraham Ibn Ezra
work: Introductions to Astrology (Beginning of Wisdom & Judgments of the Zodiacal Signs)
title: Cancellation
text: והבטול: שיהיה הכוכב בכח הגוף האחר ובטרם שיהיה אחד ישוב אחורנית.
translation: Cancellation: when a planet is in the power of another body, but before it becomes one, it turns retrograde.
chunk_ref: d the light one [A] applies to the heavy one [B], and another planet [C] aspects

author: Abraham Ibn Ezra
work: Introductions to Astrology (Beginning of Wisdom & Judgments of the Zodiacal Signs)
title: Accident
text: והמקרה, שלשה כוכבים במזל אחד, האחד קל ומעלותיו רבות, והשני כבד ממנו ומעלותיו מעטות, והשלישי קל מן הראשון והוא מתחבר בכבד; וישוב הקל הראשון שמעלותיו רבות אחורנית ויתחבר עם הכבד.
translation: Accident: when three planets are in one sign, one is light and has many degrees, the second is heavier than it and has few degrees, and the third is lighter than the first and applies to the heavy one; and the first light planet, which has many degrees, turns retrograde and conjoins the heavy one.
chunk_ref: d the light one [A] applies to the heavy one [B], and another planet [C] aspects

author: Abraham Ibn Ezra
work: Introductions to Astrology (Beginning of Wisdom & Judgments of the Zodiacal Signs)
title: Loss
text: והאבוד, שיהיה הכוכב הולך להתחבר כוכב אחר במזל אחד, וקודם שיתחבר עמו יסע הכבד מהמזל ויתחבר עמו שם כוכב אחר.
translation: Loss: when a planet is going to conjoin another planet in the same sign, and before it conjoins it, the heavy one moves out of the sign and another planet conjoins it there.
chunk_ref: d the light one [A] applies to the heavy one [B], and another planet [C] aspects

author: Abraham Ibn Ezra
work: Introductions to Astrology (Beginning of Wisdom & Judgments of the Zodiacal Signs)
title: Cutting the Light
text: וכריתות האור על שלשה דרכים. האחד שיהיה קל מתחבר בכבד ממנו ושניהם במזל אחד, ויהיה כובב שלישי קל במזל השני; וקודם שיתחבר הקל הראשון עם הכבד, ישוב הכוכב שהוא במזל השני אחורנית ויכנס במזל ששם הכבדויתחבר עמו; והנה יכרית אורו מהכוכב הראשון. והדרך השני שיהיה כוכב קל מתחבר בכוכב כבד ממנו ושניהם במזל אחד, גם אותו הכבד יתחבר בכוכב אחר ממנו, וקודם שיגיע הראשון אל השני יתחבר השני עם השלישי ויעברנו; והנה יכרית האור מן הראשון. והדרך השלישי שיתחבר כוכב עם כוכב אחר שאין צורך אליו.
translation: Cutting the light occurs in three ways. The first is when a light planet applies to a heavier one, and both are in the same sign, and there is a third light planet in the next sign; and before the first light planet conjoins the heavy one, the planet that is in the next sign turns retrograde and enters the sign where the heavy one is and conjoins it; and behold, it cuts its light from the first planet. The second way is when a light planet applies to a planet heavier than it, and both are in the same sign, and that heavy one also applies to another planet heavier than it; and before the first reaches the second, the second conjoins the third and passes it; and behold, it cuts the light from the first. The third way is when a planet conjoins another planet for which there is no need.
chunk_ref: d the light one [A] applies to the heavy one [B], and another planet [C] aspects

author: Abraham Ibn Ezra
work: Introductions to Astrology (Beginning of Wisdom & Judgments of the Zodiacal Signs)
title: Pleasure
text: והנועם, שיהיה הכוכב בבור או בשפלותו ויתחבר עמו כוכב אחר, או יתחבר הוא כוכב אחר ויהיה אותו הכוכב אוהבו או בעל ביתו או שיש לו שום ממשלה באותו המזל; והנה יוציאנו מבורו או משפלותו וינעים עליו.
translation: Pleasure: when a planet is in its fall or detriment and another planet conjoins it, or it conjoins another planet, and that planet is its friend, or its ruler, or has some dominion in that sign; and behold, it will lift it from its fall or detriment and make it pleasant.
chunk_ref: d the light one [A] applies to the heavy one [B], and another planet [C] aspects

author: Abraham Ibn Ezra
work: Introductions to Astrology (Beginning of Wisdom & Judgments of the Zodiacal Signs)
title: Recompense
text: והתגמול: אותו הבוכב שהוציא הראשון מבורו או משפלותו בשיביט הכוכב שהוציא, ואותו המוציא נופל בבור או במקום שפלותו, יוציאנו אותו הכוכב.
translation: Recompense: that planet which lifted the first from its fall or detriment, when the planet that lifted it aspects, and that lifter falls into its fall or detriment, that planet will lift it.
chunk_ref: d the light one [A] applies to the heavy one [B], and another planet [C] aspects

author: Abraham Ibn Ezra
work: Introductions to Astrology (Beginning of Wisdom & Judgments of the Zodiacal Signs)
title: Reception
text: והקבול, שיתחבר הכוכב, בין במחברת במבט, בכוכב שהוא בעל ביתו, או בעל בית כבודו, או בעל בית שלישותו, או גבולו, או בעל פניו; והנה יקבלנו אותו הכוכב. או שיתחבר כוכב כוכב השני בבית הנותן הבח או בבית כבודו, גם זה קבול; רק אם היה בבית שלישותו או בגבולו או פניו לא יקבלנו קיבול גמור. רק אם יתחברו שתי ממשלות, השלישות עם הגבול או עם הפנים, ומבט שלישית וששית; גם הוא קבול. גם הם אס יהיו במעלות מזלות שהם במצעדיהם. והכוכב הטוב יקבל הטוב בעבור היות תולדתו ישרה, ומאדים ושבתאי יקבל זה את זה אם היו במחברת או במבט ששית או שלישית ולא בשאר המבטים.
translation: Reception: when a planet conjoins, whether by conjunction or aspect, a planet that is its domicile ruler, or its exaltation ruler, or its triplicity ruler, or its term ruler, or its face ruler; and behold, that planet will receive it. Or when a planet conjoins another planet, and the second planet is in the house of the giver of power or in its house of exaltation, this is also reception; but if it is in its house of triplicity, or its term, or its face, it will not receive it completely. Only if two dignities combine, triplicity with term or with face, and a trine or sextile aspect; this is also reception. Also if they are in the degrees of the signs that are in their motions. And a benefic planet will receive good because its nature is upright, and Mars and Saturn will receive each other if they are in conjunction or in a sextile or trine aspect, but not in other aspects.
chunk_ref: d the light one [A] applies to the heavy one [B], and another planet [C] aspects

author: Abraham Ibn Ezra
work: Introductions to Astrology (Beginning of Wisdom & Judgments of the Zodiacal Signs)
title: Strong, Medium, and Weak Reception
text: וש מהקבול שהוא תקיף ואמצעי וחלש. והקבול התקיף לעולם יהיה ללבנה השמש, כי היא תקבלנו מכל המזלות בי אורה ממנו, רק יהיה ביגיעה ועצבון, ואם היה במזל שיש לה שום ממשלה שם, אז יהיו שנים קבולים. וכמו כוכב חמה, באשריקבל הכוכב ממזל בתולה, בעבור כי הוא ביתו ובית כבודו, אזיהיה קבול שלם. וקבול הבית אמצעי. וקבול השלישות או הגבול או הפנים חלש.
translation: And there is reception that is strong, medium, and weak. Strong reception will always be for the Moon from the Sun, for it receives it from all signs because its light is from it, but it will be with effort and sorrow, and if it is in a sign where it has some dominion, then there will be two receptions. And like Mercury, when the planet receives from the sign of Virgo, because it is its domicile and exaltation, then it will be complete reception. And domicile reception is medium. And triplicity, term, or face reception is weak.
chunk_ref: d the light one [A] applies to the heavy one [B], and another planet [C] aspects

author: Abraham Ibn Ezra
work: Introductions to Astrology (Beginning of Wisdom & Judgments of the Zodiacal Signs)
title: Moon's Significance
text: הירח קרוב לארץ ומהיר בהלוכו; הוא יותר מעורב עם הכוכבים, כי היא נותנת כח להם ואין כוכב נותן כחו לה; היא מעבירה אור מכוכב לכוכב; היא דומה לנולד כי אורה הולך וגדל עד היותה שלמה ואחר כן הולך ומתמעט עד שאינה נראית ונפרדת מהעולם. על כן אמרו כל הקדמונים כי היא מורה על כל דבר וכל מחשבה וראשית כל מעשה. אם היא בכחה ובתנאים טובים, כל מה שיחל אדם לעשות באותה שעה יצליח; והפך הדבר אם היא עם המזיקים. אמרו כי תביט לשואל אל המזל העולה ובעל ביתו ואל הדבר שהוא שואל עליו אל המזל השביעי ובעל ביתו, ותעשה הירח שותפת לו תמיד. אם הירח הולכת לבדה היא מורה כי כל מה שישאל השואל הוא דבר שאין בו ממש ואי אפשר. כאשר יתקרב כוכב להתחבר או למבט עם הירח, הוא מורה על כל הדברים העתידים ומה שיקוה השואל – טוב אם הכוכב טוב, רע אם הוא מזיק. ההפרדה מהירח מורה על הדברים שעברו. אם נפרדה ממחברת או ממבט עם כוכב טוב, היו טובים; ואם עם כוכב מזיק היו רעים. אם הכוכב שהירח נותנת כחה אליו הוא בכחו, אז יעשה הדבר כהוגן, והפך הדבר אם היה חלש. וככה כל כוכב שנותן כחו אל כוכב אחר; יעשה הדבר כפי כח המקבל. ביום שהירח עם המזיקים, כל מה שישאל השואל לא יעשה שלם וכהוגן אם הכוכב במזל העולה. אם הירח באחד היתדות הוא יותר רע, כי הוא מורה על פחד בנפש וחולי בגוף; אם היא בבתים הנופלים היא מורה על פחד ולא על חולי.
translation: The Moon is close to the Earth and swift in its motion; it is more mixed with the planets, for it gives power to them, and no planet gives its power to it; it transfers light from planet to planet; it resembles the native, for its light grows until it is full and then gradually diminishes until it is invisible and departs from the world. Therefore, all the ancients said that it signifies every matter, every thought, and the beginning of every action. If it is in its strength and in good conditions, everything a person begins to do at that time will succeed; and the opposite is true if it is with malefics. They said that you should look for the querent at the ascendant sign and its ruler, and for the matter he asks about, at the seventh sign and its ruler, and always make the Moon its partner. If the Moon moves alone, it indicates that everything the querent asks is insubstantial and impossible. When a planet approaches conjunction or aspect with the Moon, it signifies all future events and what the querent hopes for – good if the planet is benefic, bad if it is malefic. Separation from the Moon indicates past events. If it separated from conjunction or aspect with a benefic planet, they were good; and if with a malefic planet, they were bad. If the planet to which the Moon gives its power is in its strength, then the matter will be done properly, and the opposite is true if it was weak. And so it is for any planet that gives its power to another planet; the matter will be done according to the power of the receiver. On a day when the Moon is with malefics, everything the querent asks about will not be done completely and properly if the planet is in the ascendant sign. If the Moon is in one of the cardines, it is worse, for it signifies fear in the soul and illness in the body; if it is in the cadent houses, it signifies fear but not illness.
chunk_ref: d the light one [A] applies to the heavy one [B], and another planet [C] aspects

author: Abraham Ibn Ezra
work: Introductions to Astrology (Beginning of Wisdom & Judgments of the Zodiacal Signs)
title: Benefic and Malefic Planets
text: הבוכבים על שני פנים, טוב ורע, ובבל מקום שתמעא הכוכב הטוב אמור טוב והפך הדבר. ט'. הבוכבים הטובים ישרים והם מועילים, בין שיקבלו ובין שלא יקבלו, ואם יקבלו יותר טוב; והמזיקים ישחיתו בתולדתם, ואם היה הכוכב מקובל ממנו יקל רעתו, וככה אם יהיה מבטו אליו שלישית או ששית. ולא יקרא הכובב מוזק עד שיהיה ניצוץ המזיק בפי בח גופו; ואם היה פחות מזה לא יורה בי אם על נזק מעט. ואחרי שיפרד ממנו במבטי, אפילו מעלה אחת ואף כי אס היו המעלות יותר, יפחיד פחד שלא יוציא לידי מעשה. ובבה דרך הכוכב הטוב והכוכב שיורה על הדבר שיהיה: אם לא יביט אל המזל הצומח לא תצא לאור תקות המבקש. י
translation: Planets are of two kinds, benefic and malefic. In every place you find a benefic planet, say good, and the opposite is true. Benefic planets are upright and beneficial, whether they receive or not, and if they receive, it is better; and malefics destroy by their nature, and if the planet is received by it, its evil will be lessened, and so too if its aspect to it is trine or sextile. And a planet is not called harmed until the ray of the malefic is within the power of its body; and if it is less than that, it indicates only slight harm. And after it separates from its aspect, even one degree, and especially if there are more degrees, it will cause fear that will not come to fruition. And in this way, the benefic planet and the planet that indicates what will be: if it does not aspect the ascendant sign, the querent's hope will not come to light.
chunk_ref: d the light one [A] applies to the heavy one [B], and another planet [C] aspects

author: Abraham Ibn Ezra
work: Introductions to Astrology (Beginning of Wisdom & Judgments of the Zodiacal Signs)
title: Benefics and Malefics
text: א. הבוכבים הטובים, אם יביטו אל הרעים, יחסרו מרעתם. י
translation: Benefic planets, if they aspect malefics, will diminish their evil.
chunk_ref: d the light one [A] applies to the heavy one [B], and another planet [C] aspects

author: Abraham Ibn Ezra
work: Introductions to Astrology (Beginning of Wisdom & Judgments of the Zodiacal Signs)
title: Benefics and Malefics
text: ב. הטובים לעולם יורו על טובה והמזיקים על רע; רק אם היה המזיק בכחו הגדול יורה על טוב, רק יבא ביגיעה ועצבון. י
translation: Benefics will always indicate good, and malefics evil; but if the malefic is in great strength, it will indicate good, but it will come with effort and sorrow.
chunk_ref: d the light one [A] applies to the heavy one [B], and another planet [C] aspects

author: Abraham Ibn Ezra
work: Introductions to Astrology (Beginning of Wisdom & Judgments of the Zodiacal Signs)
title: Weak Benefics
text: ג. אם היו הטובים בהפך דמיונם, או בבית קלונם, או בבית שנאתם, או בבתים הנופלים שאין ביניהם ובין המזל הצומח מבט, לא יועילו בלל. י
translation: If the benefics are in opposition to their nature, or in their fall, or in their detriment, or in cadent houses where there is no aspect between them and the ascendant sign, they will not be beneficial at all.
chunk_ref: d the light one [A] applies to the heavy one [B], and another planet [C] aspects

author: Abraham Ibn Ezra
work: Introductions to Astrology (Beginning of Wisdom & Judgments of the Zodiacal Signs)
title: Weak Malefics
text: ד. גם המזיקים, אם היו כבה, מעט יזיקו. ט
translation: Also, malefics, if they are like this, will do little harm.
chunk_ref: d the light one [A] applies to the heavy one [B], and another planet [C] aspects

author: Abraham Ibn Ezra
work: Introductions to Astrology (Beginning of Wisdom & Judgments of the Zodiacal Signs)
title: Strong Benefic
text: ו. אם היה הטוב בכחו והוא מתבודד בממשלת הנולד, תרבה טובתו.
translation: If the benefic is in its strength and is isolated in the dominion of the native, its good will increase.

author: Abraham Ibn Ezra
work: Introductions to Astrology (Beginning of Wisdom & Judgments of the Zodiacal Signs)
title: Jupiter and Venus with Malefics
text: אם יביט צדק אל המזיק יהפך תולדתו לטוב, ונגה לא יובל להפוך תולדת שבתאי בי אם בעזרת צדק, וצדק נזק שבתאי ונגה יסיר נזק מאדים מצדק.
translation: If Jupiter aspects a malefic, it will change its nature for good. Venus cannot change the nature of Saturn except with the help of Jupiter. Jupiter removes the harm of Saturn, and Venus removes the harm of Mars more than Jupiter.
chunk_ref: ortune.* (7) (xii) The benefics always signify good fortune and the malefics mis

author: Abraham Ibn Ezra
work: Introductions to Astrology (Beginning of Wisdom & Judgments of the Zodiacal Signs)
title: Benefics and Malefics in Bad Positions
text: אם היו הטובים והרעים במקום רע או נשרפים, יורו על דבר נבזה ולא יעשו טוב ולא רע בעבור חלישותם.
translation: If benefics and malefics are in a bad place or combust, they indicate a contemptible matter and will do neither good nor bad due to their weakness.
chunk_ref: ortune.* (7) (xii) The benefics always signify good fortune and the malefics mis

author: Abraham Ibn Ezra
work: Introductions to Astrology (Beginning of Wisdom & Judgments of the Zodiacal Signs)
title: Strong Malefic vs. Weak Benefic
text: אם היה המזיק מזרחי מהשמש, במזל שיש לו בו ממשלה, ולא יביט אליו מזיק אחר, הוא טוב מהכוכב הטוב שהוא נשרף או חוזר אחורנית.
translation: If a malefic is oriental to the Sun, in a sign where it has rulership, and no other malefic aspects it, it is better than a benefic that is combust or retrograde.

author: Abraham Ibn Ezra
work: Introductions to Astrology (Beginning of Wisdom & Judgments of the Zodiacal Signs)
title: Malefic Lords of Query
text: אם היו המזיקים בעלי הדבר המבוקש, ויתחבר עמהם בעל המזל הצומח, והלבנה ממבט רביעית או נבח, אם יתכן הדבר המבוקש, אחריתו תהיה לרעה.
translation: If the lords of the requested matter are malefics, and the lord of the ascendant applies to them, and the Moon is in a quartile or opposition aspect, then if the requested matter occurs, its outcome will be bad.
chunk_ref: ortune.* (7) (xii) The benefics always signify good fortune and the malefics mis

author: Abraham Ibn Ezra
work: Introductions to Astrology (Beginning of Wisdom & Judgments of the Zodiacal Signs)
title: Malefic in Ascendant
text: אם היה המזיק במזל הצומח ויש לו בו שום ממשלה יקל מרעתו, ואם היה חוזר אחורנית אז יוסיף רעה על רעה.
translation: If a malefic is in the ascendant sign and has some rulership there, its harm is lessened. But if it is retrograde, it will add evil upon evil.
chunk_ref: ortune.* (7) (xii) The benefics always signify good fortune and the malefics mis

author: Abraham Ibn Ezra

title: Malefic Aspecting Benefic
text: אם יביט המזיק אל הטוב מבט רביעית או נבח, יחסר מטובתו.
translation: If a malefic aspects a benefic with a quartile or opposition aspect, it will diminish its good.
chunk_ref: ortune.* (7) (xii) The benefics always signify good fortune and the malefics mis

author: Abraham Ibn Ezra
work: Introductions to Astrology (Beginning of Wisdom & Judgments of the Zodiacal Signs)
title: Malefic in Dignity and Angle
text: אם היה המזיק במקום ממשלתו והוא באחד היתדות או הסמוכים, יחשב כבח כוכבים טובים.
translation: If a malefic is in a place of its rulership and is in one of the angles or succedent houses, its power is considered like that of benefics.

author: Abraham Ibn Ezra
work: Introductions to Astrology (Beginning of Wisdom & Judgments of the Zodiacal Signs)
title: Malefic as a Stranger
text: אם היה המזיק גר במקומו תוסיף רעתו.
translation: If a malefic is a stranger in its place, its harm will increase.

author: Abraham Ibn Ezra
work: Introductions to Astrology (Beginning of Wisdom & Judgments of the Zodiacal Signs)
title: Malefic in Angles and Aspects
text: המזיק, אם היה באחד היתדות, או יזיק כוכב ממבט רביעית או נכח, אז תהיה רעתו גמורה, ואף כי אם היה תקיף מהכוכב, וממבט שלישית או ששית יקל מרעתו.
translation: If a malefic is in one of the angles, or harms a planet with a quartile or opposition aspect, its harm will be complete, especially if it is stronger than the planet. But with a trine or sextile aspect, its harm is lessened.
chunk_ref: ortune.* (7) (xii) The benefics always signify good fortune and the malefics mis

author: Abraham Ibn Ezra
work: Introductions to Astrology (Beginning of Wisdom & Judgments of the Zodiacal Signs)
title: Malefic as Lord of Query
text: אם היה המזיק בעל הדבר המבוקש, יורה על איחור הדבר ולא יבא בי אם בעצבון ודאגה.
translation: If a malefic is the lord of the requested matter, it indicates a delay in the matter, and it will only come with sadness and worry.
chunk_ref: ortune.* (7) (xii) The benefics always signify good fortune and the malefics mis

author: Abraham Ibn Ezra
work: Introductions to Astrology (Beginning of Wisdom & Judgments of the Zodiacal Signs)
title: Malefic and Benefic Interactions
text: אם נתן המזיק למזיק, הנה יוסיף רעה על רעה; ואם טוב לטוב, יוסיף טובה על טובה; ואם רע לטוב, יתהפך הדבר מרע לטוב; ואם טוב לרע, יתהפך מטוב לרע.
translation: If a malefic gives to a malefic, it will add evil upon evil. If a benefic gives to a benefic, it will add good upon good. If a malefic gives to a benefic, the matter will turn from bad to good. And if a benefic gives to a malefic, it will turn from good to bad.
chunk_ref: ortune.* (7) (xii) The benefics always signify good fortune and the malefics mis

author: Abraham Ibn Ezra
work: Introductions to Astrology (Beginning of Wisdom & Judgments of the Zodiacal Signs)
title: Planet in House or Exaltation
text: כל כוכב טוב או רע, אם היה בביתו או בבית כבודו, לעולם יורה על טוב.
translation: Every planet, whether benefic or malefic, if it is in its own house or house of exaltation, always indicates good.
chunk_ref: ortune.* (7) (xii) The benefics always signify good fortune and the malefics mis

author: Abraham Ibn Ezra
work: Introductions to Astrology (Beginning of Wisdom & Judgments of the Zodiacal Signs)
title: Planet at Cusp and Power
text: כל כוכב שיהיה בתחלת המזל, יחשב חלש עד היותו ארבע מעלות ממנו; וככה, אם היה הכוכב רחוק מאחד הבתים פחות מחמש מעלות, יחשב כח הבית; ואם יותר הוא נופל מכח הבית.
translation: Any planet at the beginning of a sign is considered weak until it is four degrees past it. Likewise, if a planet is less than five degrees from one of the houses, it is considered within the power of the house; but if it is more, it falls outside the power of the house.
chunk_ref: ortune.* (7) (xii) The benefics always signify good fortune and the malefics mis

author: Abraham Ibn Ezra
work: Introductions to Astrology (Beginning of Wisdom & Judgments of the Zodiacal Signs)
title: Planet in First 15 Degrees
text: כל כוכב שיהיה בתחלת הבית עד חמש עשרה מעלות, יש לו כח גדול.
translation: Any planet that is in the beginning of a house up to fifteen degrees has great power.
chunk_ref: ortune.* (7) (xii) The benefics always signify good fortune and the malefics mis

author: Abraham Ibn Ezra
work: Introductions to Astrology (Beginning of Wisdom & Judgments of the Zodiacal Signs)
title: Planet at Malefic Angle
text: אם היה הכוכב באחד יתדות המזיק והוא מתפרד ממבטו במעלה אחת, יפחיד ולא יוציא לידי מעשה.
translation: If a planet is at one of the angles of a malefic and separates from its aspect by one degree, it will cause fear but will not come to fruition.
chunk_ref: ortune.* (7) (xii) The benefics always signify good fortune and the malefics mis

author: Abraham Ibn Ezra
work: Introductions to Astrology (Beginning of Wisdom & Judgments of the Zodiacal Signs)
title: Planet in House of Dejection
text: אם היה הכוכב בבית קלונו, יורה על דאגה ומצור ומצוק.
translation: If a planet is in the house of its dejection, it indicates worry, siege, and distress.
chunk_ref: ortune.* (7) (xii) The benefics always signify good fortune and the malefics mis

author: Abraham Ibn Ezra
work: Introductions to Astrology (Beginning of Wisdom & Judgments of the Zodiacal Signs)
title: Retrograde Planet
text: הכוכב החוזר לאחור יורה על מרי והשחתת כל מה שיחשב.
translation: A retrograde planet indicates rebellion and the destruction of everything that is planned.
chunk_ref: ortune.* (7) (xii) The benefics always signify good fortune and the malefics mis

author: Abraham Ibn Ezra
work: Introductions to Astrology (Beginning of Wisdom & Judgments of the Zodiacal Signs)
title: Planet in Station
text: הכוכב ההווה במעמדו הראשון הוא באדם שלא ידע מה יעשה וסופו לרעה; ואם במעמדו השני הוא באדם מקוה דבר ולא תאבד תקותו.
translation: A planet in its first station is like a person who does not know what to do and whose end is bad. If in its second station, it is like a person who hopes for something and whose hope will not be lost.
chunk_ref: ortune.* (7) (xii) The benefics always signify good fortune and the malefics mis

author: Abraham Ibn Ezra
work: Introductions to Astrology (Beginning of Wisdom & Judgments of the Zodiacal Signs)
title: Planet Slowing Down
text: אם הכוכב ממתין בהליכתו, יאחר הדבר בין טוב ובין רע, ואם היה צדק ושבתאי במזלות המתהפכים ימהרו הדבר.
translation: If a planet is slowing down in its motion, the matter, whether good or bad, will be delayed. But if Jupiter and Saturn are in the tropical signs, they will hasten the matter.
chunk_ref: ortune.* (7) (xii) The benefics always signify good fortune and the malefics mis

author: Abraham Ibn Ezra
work: Introductions to Astrology (Beginning of Wisdom & Judgments of the Zodiacal Signs)
title: Planet at End of Sign
text: אם היה הכוכב בסוף המזל, אבד כחו מהמזל הראשון וכל כחו במזל שיכנס בו; ואם היה הכוכב במעלת עשרים ותשע מהמזל עודנו כחו במזל שהוא שם, כי בשלש מעלות יש לכוכב כח במעלה שהוא שם ומעלה לפניו ומעלה לאחריו.
translation: If a planet is at the end of a sign, its power from the first sign is lost, and all its power is in the sign it is entering. If the planet is in the twenty-ninth degree of the sign, its power is still in the sign it is in, because a planet has power in three degrees: in the degree it is in, one degree before it, and one degree after it.
chunk_ref: ortune.* (7) (xii) The benefics always signify good fortune and the malefics mis

author: Abraham Ibn Ezra
work: Introductions to Astrology (Beginning of Wisdom & Judgments of the Zodiacal Signs)
title: Planet Pursuing Another
text: אם היה כוכב הולך להתחבר עם שני, וטרם היותם דבקים יצא השני אל מזל שני וירדוף אחריו הכוכב הראשון וישיגנו שם ולא יתחבר עם קודם השגתו כוכב אחר, ישלם הדבר המבוקש אחר יאוש.
translation: If a planet is going to conjoin a second, but before they unite, the second enters another sign, and the first planet pursues it and overtakes it there, but does not conjoin it before another planet overtakes it, the requested matter will be fulfilled only after despair.
chunk_ref: ortune.* (7) (xii) The benefics always signify good fortune and the malefics mis

author: Abraham Ibn Ezra
work: Introductions to Astrology (Beginning of Wisdom & Judgments of the Zodiacal Signs)
title: Aspect Before Conjunction
text: אם יביט כוכב לכוכב השני שנסע ממקומו קודם השגת כוכב הקל, לא יזיקנו כי המבט לא יבטל מחברת הגופים.
translation: If a planet aspects a second planet that moved from its place before a lighter planet reached it, it will not harm it, because the aspect will not cancel the conjunction of the bodies.
chunk_ref: ortune.* (7) (xii) The benefics always signify good fortune and the malefics mis

author: Abraham Ibn Ezra
work: Introductions to Astrology (Beginning of Wisdom & Judgments of the Zodiacal Signs)
title: Planet in Sign of its Nature
text: אם היה הכוכב במזל שהוא בתולדתו, יוסיף כחו, ואם הפך תולדתו יחלש, כמו שבתאי בבית קר ויבש.
translation: If a planet is in a sign that is of its nature, its power will increase. But if it is opposite to its nature, it will be weakened, like Saturn in a cold and dry sign.
chunk_ref: ortune.* (7) (xii) The benefics always signify good fortune and the malefics mis

author: Abraham Ibn Ezra
work: Introductions to Astrology (Beginning of Wisdom & Judgments of the Zodiacal Signs)
title: Received Planet
text: הכוכב המקובל, אם היה טוב יוסיף טובתו, ואם מזיק יקל מרעתו.
translation: A received planet, if it is a benefic, will increase its good. If it is a malefic, its harm will be lessened.
chunk_ref: ortune.* (7) (xii) The benefics always signify good fortune and the malefics mis

author: Abraham Ibn Ezra
work: Introductions to Astrology (Beginning of Wisdom & Judgments of the Zodiacal Signs)
title: Planet in 6th or 12th House
text: הכוכב אם לא יהיה באחד ממקומות ממשלתו והוא בבית הששי או שנים העשר, אין טוב בו.
translation: A planet is not good if it is not in one of its places of rulership and is in the sixth or twelfth house.
chunk_ref: ortune.* (7) (xii) The benefics always signify good fortune and the malefics mis

author: Abraham Ibn Ezra
work: Introductions to Astrology (Beginning of Wisdom & Judgments of the Zodiacal Signs)
title: Planet Under Sun's Rays
text: הכוכב, אם היה תחת האור והוא מהעליונים, אין כח לו; וככה השפלים, ואם היו חוזרים לאחור, אין רעה כמוה.
translation: A planet, if it is under the Sun's rays and is one of the superior planets, has no power. The same applies to the inferior planets, and if they are retrograde, there is nothing worse.
chunk_ref: ortune.* (7) (xii) The benefics always signify good fortune and the malefics mis

author: Abraham Ibn Ezra
work: Introductions to Astrology (Beginning of Wisdom & Judgments of the Zodiacal Signs)
title: Retrograde Planet Becoming Direct
text: אם היה הכוכב שיורה על הדבר חוזר לאחור ויתישר מהלכו, אז יורה שיהיה קצת הדבר; וככה אם היה תחת אור השמש ויצא מתחת אורו.
translation: If the planet indicating the matter is retrograde and then becomes direct in its motion, it indicates that only part of the matter will occur. The same applies if it was under the Sun's rays and moves out from under its rays.
chunk_ref: ortune.* (7) (xii) The benefics always signify good fortune and the malefics mis

author: Abraham Ibn Ezra
work: Introductions to Astrology (Beginning of Wisdom & Judgments of the Zodiacal Signs)
title: Planet in Pits
text: הכוכב, אם היה באחת הבורות, אם הוא כוכב טוב, יחסר מטובתו, ואם רע יוסיף על רעתו.
translation: If a planet is in one of the pits, if it is a benefic planet, its good will be diminished. If it is a malefic, its harm will be increased.
chunk_ref: ortune.* (7) (xii) The benefics always signify good fortune and the malefics mis

author: Abraham Ibn Ezra
work: Introductions to Astrology (Beginning of Wisdom & Judgments of the Zodiacal Signs)
title: Planet in 8th House
text: אם היה הכוכב הטוב בבית השמיני, לא יורה לא על טוב ולא על רע; ואם הוא מהמזיקים, יורה על רעה גמורה.
translation: If a benefic planet is in the eighth house, it indicates neither good nor bad. If it is a malefic, it indicates complete evil.
chunk_ref: ortune.* (7) (xii) The benefics always signify good fortune and the malefics mis

author: Abraham Ibn Ezra
work: Introductions to Astrology (Beginning of Wisdom & Judgments of the Zodiacal Signs)
title: Planet Standing Still
text: אם היה הכוכב עומד לחזור, יורה על חסרון המבוקש והקושי וההפסד; ואם עומד על היושר, יורה על טוב הדבר וכחו ויושרו.
translation: If a planet is about to turn retrograde, it indicates a lack of the desired outcome, difficulty, and loss. If it is about to turn direct, it indicates the goodness of the matter, its strength, and its rectitude.
chunk_ref: ortune.* (7) (xii) The benefics always signify good fortune and the malefics mis

author: Abraham Ibn Ezra
work: Introductions to Astrology (Beginning of Wisdom & Judgments of the Zodiacal Signs)
title: 12th House of Planet
text: אם היה כח השנים עשר של הכוכב במקום טוב, אין טוב בו.
translation: If the twelfth house of a planet is in a good place, there is no good in it.
chunk_ref: ortune.* (7) (xii) The benefics always signify good fortune and the malefics mis

author: Abraham Ibn Ezra
work: Introductions to Astrology (Beginning of Wisdom & Judgments of the Zodiacal Signs)
title: Planet in Fixed, Mutable, or Common Signs
text: אם היה הכוכב במזל עומד יורה על כל דבר שיעמוד ויתקיים, ואם היה במתהפך יתהפך הדבר, ואם היה במזל שיש לו שני גופות יורה כי קצת הדבר יתקיים או ישנה הדבר פעמים.
translation: If a planet is in a fixed sign, it indicates that everything will stand firm and endure. If it is in a mutable sign, the matter will change. If it is in a common sign, it indicates that part of the matter will endure or the matter will change twice.
chunk_ref: ortune.* (7) (xii) The benefics always signify good fortune and the malefics mis

author: Abraham Ibn Ezra
work: Introductions to Astrology (Beginning of Wisdom & Judgments of the Zodiacal Signs)
title: Receiving Planet in Bad Place
text: אם היה הכוכב המקבל הכח במקום רע, יורה על רע.
translation: If the planet receiving power is in a bad place, it indicates evil.
chunk_ref: ortune.* (7) (xii) The benefics always signify good fortune and the malefics mis

author: Abraham Ibn Ezra
work: Introductions to Astrology (Beginning of Wisdom & Judgments of the Zodiacal Signs)
title: Lord of Ascendant in Detriment
text: אם היה בעל המזל הצומח בבית שנאתו, אין לו חפץ שלם בדבר שישאל.
translation: If the lord of the ascendant is in the house of its detriment, it has no complete desire for the matter being asked about.
chunk_ref: ortune.* (7) (xii) The benefics always signify good fortune and the malefics mis

author: Abraham Ibn Ezra
work: Introductions to Astrology (Beginning of Wisdom & Judgments of the Zodiacal Signs)
title: Planet Conjoining Benefics and Malefics
text: אם היה הכוכב מתחבר עם טובים ורעים, יראה תולדת התקיף שבהם.
translation: If a planet conjoins both benefics and malefics, it will show the nature of the stronger among them.
chunk_ref: ortune.* (7) (xii) The benefics always signify good fortune and the malefics mis

author: Abraham Ibn Ezra
work: Introductions to Astrology (Beginning of Wisdom & Judgments of the Zodiacal Signs)
title: Lord of Ascendant and Query
text: אם היה בעל המזל הצומח נותן הכח לבעל הבית המבוקש, יבקש הדבר בכל חפצו, ואם בעל הדבר המבוקש יתן הכח לבעל המזל הצומח, יהיה הדבר בלא יגיעה.
translation: If the lord of the ascendant gives power to the lord of the requested house, the matter will be sought with all desire. And if the lord of the requested matter gives power to the lord of the ascendant, the matter will occur without effort.
chunk_ref: ortune.* (7) (xii) The benefics always signify good fortune and the malefics mis

author: Abraham Ibn Ezra
work: Introductions to Astrology (Beginning of Wisdom & Judgments of the Zodiacal Signs)
title: Intervening Planet
text: אם היה כוכב מונע ביניהם, יורה על אדם שיבדיל בינו ובין הדבר המבוקש.
translation: If there is a planet preventing their connection, it indicates a person who will separate him from the requested matter.
chunk_ref: ortune.* (7) (xii) The benefics always signify good fortune and the malefics mis

author: Abraham Ibn Ezra
work: Introductions to Astrology (Beginning of Wisdom & Judgments of the Zodiacal Signs)
title: Lord of Ascendant Separating
text: אם היה בעל המזל הצומח מתפרד מבעל הדבר המבוקש, תסורע תאותו.
translation: If the lord of the ascendant separates from the lord of the requested matter, his desire will cease.
chunk_ref: ortune.* (7) (xii) The benefics always signify good fortune and the malefics mis

author: Abraham Ibn Ezra
work: Introductions to Astrology (Beginning of Wisdom & Judgments of the Zodiacal Signs)
title: No Planet Aspecting Moon
text: אם לא יביט כוכב אל הלבנה, י
translation: If no planet aspects the Moon, it indicates...
chunk_ref: ortune.* (7) (xii) The benefics always signify good fortune and the malefics mis

author: Abraham Ibn Ezra
work: Introductions to Astrology (Beginning of Wisdom & Judgments of the Zodiacal Signs)
title: Many planets aspecting the Moon
text: נ"ה. אם יביטו כוכבים רבים אל הלבנה, יהיו העוזרים למלאות הדבר רבים.
translation: If many planets aspect the Moon, there will be many helpers to fulfill the matter.
chunk_ref: ורה על עצלות. ילא] רפ; טנק: חסר. ?עלטובולא על רע] ערטנק; פ: על רע ולא על טוב. מ"

author: Abraham Ibn Ezra
work: Introductions to Astrology (Beginning of Wisdom & Judgments of the Zodiacal Signs)
title: Planet transferring light to requested matter
text: נ'ו. אם היה כוכב מעתיק מבעל המזל הצומח אל בעל הדבר המבוקש, יהיה הדבר על ידי אמצעי.
translation: If a planet transfers light from the lord of the ascendant to the lord of the requested matter, the matter will be achieved through an intermediary.
chunk_ref: ורה על עצלות. ילא] רפ; טנק: חסר. ?עלטובולא על רע] ערטנק; פ: על רע ולא על טוב. מ"

author: Abraham Ibn Ezra
work: Introductions to Astrology (Beginning of Wisdom & Judgments of the Zodiacal Signs)
title: Lord of ascendant in triplicity
text: נ"ז. אם היה בעל הצומח בבית שלישותו ובעלי! מזלות השלישות יביטו אליו, יעזרוהו קרוביו.
translation: If the lord of the ascendant is in its triplicity house and the lords of the triplicity signs aspect it, its relatives will help it.
chunk_ref: ורה על עצלות. ילא] רפ; טנק: חסר. ?עלטובולא על רע] ערטנק; פ: על רע ולא על טוב. מ"

author: Abraham Ibn Ezra
work: Introductions to Astrology (Beginning of Wisdom & Judgments of the Zodiacal Signs)
title: Planet returning light
text: נ"ח. אם היה הכוכב על דרך שהזכרנו מהשבת האור, יהיה הדבר אחריאוש.
translation: If the planet is in the manner we mentioned concerning the return of light, the matter will be after despair.
chunk_ref: ורה על עצלות. ילא] רפ; טנק: חסר. ?עלטובולא על רע] ערטנק; פ: על רע ולא על טוב. מ"

author: Abraham Ibn Ezra
work: Introductions to Astrology (Beginning of Wisdom & Judgments of the Zodiacal Signs)
title: Planet giving power
text: נ"ט. אם היה המורה בעניין תת הכח, יורה כי הדבר ישלם3 כרצונו.
translation: If the significator is in a position of giving power, it signifies that the matter will be completed as desired.
chunk_ref: ורה על עצלות. ילא] רפ; טנק: חסר. ?עלטובולא על רע] ערטנק; פ: על רע ולא על טוב. מ"

author: Abraham Ibn Ezra
work: Introductions to Astrology (Beginning of Wisdom & Judgments of the Zodiacal Signs)
title: Planet giving rulership
text: ס'. אם היה המורה בדרך תת הממשלה, יורה כי הדבר יגלה אותו לאחר.
translation: If the significator is in a position of giving rulership, it signifies that the matter will reveal itself to another.
chunk_ref: ורה על עצלות. ילא] רפ; טנק: חסר. ?עלטובולא על רע] ערטנק; פ: על רע ולא על טוב. מ"

author: Abraham Ibn Ezra
work: Introductions to Astrology (Beginning of Wisdom & Judgments of the Zodiacal Signs)
title: Significator in position of birth
text: ס"א. עדות המורה, OX‏ היה בעניין תת התולדת*, יורה על רוב שמחה בדבר.
translation: The testimony of the significator, if it is in a position of birth, signifies great joy in the matter.
chunk_ref: ורה על עצלות. ילא] רפ; טנק: חסר. ?עלטובולא על רע] ערטנק; פ: על רע ולא על טוב. מ"

author: Abraham Ibn Ezra
work: Introductions to Astrology (Beginning of Wisdom & Judgments of the Zodiacal Signs)
title: Significator in position of two births
text: ס"ב. עדות המורה, אם היה בעניין תת השתיתולדות, יורה על שמחת המבקש והמבוקש ממנו הדברי.
translation: The testimony of the significator, if it is in a position of two births, signifies the joy of the querent and the one from whom the matter is sought.
chunk_ref: ורה על עצלות. ילא] רפ; טנק: חסר. ?עלטובולא על רע] ערטנק; פ: על רע ולא על טוב. מ"

author: Abraham Ibn Ezra
work: Introductions to Astrology (Beginning of Wisdom & Judgments of the Zodiacal Signs)
title: Significator in direct motion

author: Abraham Ibn Ezra
work: Introductions to Astrology (Beginning of Wisdom & Judgments of the Zodiacal Signs)
title: Lot of Fortune calculation
text: גורל הלבנה: חסר מקום השמש במזלה במעלות ישרות ממקום הלבנה במזלה, והיתרון שיש ביניהם הוסיפנו על המעלה הצומחת, ובמקום שיצא שם הגורל אותו יקרא הגורל הטוב.
translation: The Lot of the Moon: Subtract the Sun's position in its sign in direct degrees from the Moon's position in its sign, and add the remainder between them to the ascendant degree. The place where the lot falls is called the Lot of Fortune.
chunk_ref: ורה על עצלות. ילא] רפ; טנק: חסר. ?עלטובולא על רע] ערטנק; פ: על רע ולא על טוב. מ"

title: Lot of Fortune by day and night
text: כבה תעשה אם* הנולד ביום, ואם Sa‏ תחסר Snipa‏ הלבנה ממקום השמש, והיתרון תוסיפנו על המעלה הצומחת, ושם הגורל הטוב.
translation: Do this if the native was born by day. But if at night, subtract the Moon's position from the Sun's position, and add the remainder to the ascendant degree, and there is the Lot of Fortune.

title: Lots of the Fourth House
text: הבית הרביעי יש לו שבעה גורלות. (2) הראשון גורל האב, יוקח ביום מהשמש אל שבתאי, ובלילה הפוך, ויושלך מהצומחת; ואם היה שבתאי תחת אור השמש, יוקח ביום מהשמש אל צדק, ובלילה הפוך, ויושלך מהצומחת. (3) השני גורל מות האב, יוקח ביום משבתאי אל צדק, ובלילה הפוך, ויושלך מהצומחת. (4) השלישי גורל אבי האב, יוקח ביום מבעל בית השמש אל שבתאי, ובלילה הפוך, ויושלך מהצומחת. (5) ואם היתה השמש בביתה או באחד בתי שבתאי, יוקח ביום מהשמש אל שבתאי, ובלילה הפוך, ויושלך מהצומחת; ולא תחוש אם היה תחת אור השמש. (6) הרביעי גורל היחס, יוקח ביום משבתאי אל מאדים, ובלילה הפוך, ויושלך מהצומחת. (7) החמישי גורל הקרקע, יוקח ביום ובלילה משבתאי אל הלבנה, ויושלך מהצומחת. (8) הששי גורל עבודת האדמה, יוקח ביום ובלילה מנגה אל שבתאי, ויושלך מהצומחת. (9) השביעי גורל האחרית, יוקח ביום ובלילה משבתאי אל בעל בית מחברת המאורות אם היה הנולד בחצי החדש הראשון, ואל בעל בית הנכח אם נולד בחצי האחרון, ויושלך מהצומחת.
translation: The fourth house has seven lots. (2) The first is the Lot of the Father, which is taken by day from the Sun to Saturn, and by night the opposite, and it is cast from the ascendant; and if Saturn was under the Sun's rays, it is taken by day from the Sun to Jupiter, and by night the opposite, and it is cast from the ascendant. (3) The second is the Lot of the Death of the Father, which is taken by day from Saturn to Jupiter, and by night the opposite, and it is cast from the ascendant. (4) The third is the Lot of the Paternal Grandfather, which is taken by day from the lord of the Sun's house to Saturn, and by night the opposite, and it is cast from the ascendant. (5) And if the Sun was in its own house or in one of Saturn's houses, it is taken by day from the Sun to Saturn, and by night the opposite, and it is cast from the ascendant; and do not be concerned if it was under the Sun's rays. (6) The fourth is the Lot of Lineage, which is taken by day from Saturn to Mars, and by night the opposite, and it is cast from the ascendant. (7) The fifth is the Lot of Land, which is taken by day and by night from Saturn to the Moon, and it is cast from the ascendant. (8) The sixth is the Lot of Agriculture, which is taken by day and by night from Venus to Saturn, and it is cast from the ascendant. (9) The seventh is the Lot of the Outcome, which is taken by day and by night from Saturn to the lord of the house of the luminaries' conjunction if the native was born in the first half of the month, and to the lord of the house of the opposition if born in the latter half, and it is cast from the ascendant.

author: Abraham Ibn Ezra
work: Introductions to Astrology (Beginning of Wisdom & Judgments of the Zodiacal Signs)
title: Lot of Death
text: האחד גורל המות, יוקח ביום ובלילה ממעלת הלבנה אל תחלת הבית השמיני המתוקן כפי מרחב הארק, ויושלך ממקום שבתאי, ושם הגורל.
translation: (2) The first is the Lot of Death, taken day and night from the degree of the Moon to the beginning of the eighth house, corrected for the latitude of the land, and cast from the place of Saturn; and there is the lot.
chunk_ref: he ascendant. (8) The seventh is the lot of the cunning of men, which is taken (

author: Abraham Ibn Ezra

title: Lot of the Killer Planet
text: והשני גורל הכוכב הממית, יוקח ביום מבעל המעלה הצומחת אל הלבנה, ובלילה הפוך, ויושלך מהצומחת.
translation: (3) The second is the Lot of the Killer Planet, taken by day from the lord of the Ascendant degree to the Moon, and by night the reverse, and cast from the Ascendant.
chunk_ref: he ascendant. (8) The seventh is the lot of the cunning of men, which is taken (

author: Abraham Ibn Ezra
work: Introductions to Astrology (Beginning of Wisdom & Judgments of the Zodiacal Signs)
title: Lot of the Year of Danger
text: והשלישי גורל שנת הסכנה, יוקח ביום ובלילה משבתאי אל בעל בית מחברת המאורות, אם היה הנולד בחצי החדש הראשון, או אל בעל בית הנכח אם הנולד בחצי החודש האחרון, ויושלך מהצומחת.
translation: (4) The third is the Lot of the Year of Danger, taken day and night from Saturn to the lord of the house of the luminaries' conjunction, if the native was born in the first half of the month, or to the lord of the house of the opposition if the native was born in the second half of the month, and cast from the Ascendant.
chunk_ref: he ascendant. (8) The seventh is the lot of the cunning of men, which is taken (

author: Abraham Ibn Ezra

translation: (5) The fourth is the Lot of the Place of Illness, taken by day from Saturn to Mars, and by night the reverse, and cast from the place of Mercury; and there is the lot.
chunk_ref: he ascendant. (8) The seventh is the lot of the cunning of men, which is taken (

author: Abraham Ibn Ezra

title: Lot of Years of Life

title: Enoch's Lot of Rain
text: ויאמר חנוך כי יוקח בבל יום ממקום השמש אל מקום שבתאי, וההווה תשליכנו בבקר ממקום הלבנה, ושם הגורל, וזה הדבר מנוסה.
translation: And Enoch said that it should be taken every day from the place of the Sun to the place of Saturn, and the result you cast out in the morning from the place of the Moon, and there is the lot. And this matter is proven.

author: Abraham Ibn Ezra
work: Introductions to Astrology (Beginning of Wisdom & Judgments of the Zodiacal Signs)
title: Rain Lot Interpretations
text: OX AIM‏ יצא הגורל" באחד בתי שבתאי יהיה קור, ואם באחד בתי צדק יהיה רוחות, ואם באחד בתי מאדים יהיה חום, ואם באחד בתי נוגה יהיה גשם או ערפל, ואם באחד מבתי כוכב חמה יהיו רוחות חזקים, ואם בבית הלבנה יהיו בו ענן או מטר, ואם בבית השמש יהיה האויר זך.
translation: If the lot falls in one of Saturn's houses, there will be cold. If in one of Jupiter's houses, there will be winds. If in one of Mars' houses, there will be heat. If in one of Venus' houses, there will be rain or fog. If in one of Mercury's houses, there will be strong winds. If in the Moon's house, there will be clouds or rain. And if in the Sun's house, the air will be clear.
